name: technology_near_miss_event_marrowbridge_rig_utl
premise: A zero-trust rollout locked out on-call engineers from production; break-glass credentials expired yesterday. In Technology, the situation tagged internally around technology near miss event marrowbridge rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Priya Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Priya Kowalski, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Technology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mateo Chandra
agents.identity: I am Mateo Chandra, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on utility.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on utility for immediate traction on rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Priya Kowalski must choose under rights versus utility. What does Priya Kowalski do?
